series_metadata.series_description: All Notices of Conditional Approval (NOCA), Certifications or Conditional Approval, Resolutions to Participate, Resolutions of Acceptance, Project Agreements, and all related documents and correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for 3 years after project close-out ; Electronic: 3 years after project close-out, Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
